# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: es
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    environment:
      - node.name=es
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=es
      - discovery.seed_hosts=elasticsearch,es
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    networks:
      - elk-net

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - FORWARD_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=5000
      - FORWARD_SERVER_HTTPS_PORT=5001
      - INPUT_FROM_UDP={"port" => 5044}
      - LOGSTASH_SERVER_HOST=elasticsearch
      - LOGSTASH_SERVER_PORT=9200
    volumes:
      - ./logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml
    networks:
      - elk-net

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=elastic
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=changeme
    networks:
      - elk-net

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.10.2
    container_name: apm
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - APPLICATION_ID=myapp
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - SERVER_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/your/webhook/url
    networks:
      - elk-net

networks:
  elk-net:
    driver: bridge
